speaker: speaker2
text: I need to take a few classes .

speaker: speaker1
text: What kind of classes would you like to take ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Okay , you're going to need to make an appointment .

speaker: speaker2
text: I don't understand why I need to make an appointment .

speaker: speaker1
text: You need to make one to come down and fill out your paperwork .

speaker: speaker2
text: I'd like to make one now if I could .

speaker: speaker1
text: Sure you can ; when would you like to come in ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I'd like to come in tomorrow morning at 9

speaker: speaker2
text: That's great . Thank you very much .
